settings.title: Hydraulic Revolution, Within Reach
settings.description: Merging CONSPIT's patented sensor technology with advanced hydraulic engineering, the CPP APEX delivers precise control and high performance, redefining accessible hydraulic brake system at a competitive price.

settings.title: Hydraulic Innovation - Vertical Dual-Chamber Architecture
settings.description: Building on CONSPIT's core hydraulic technology, the CPP APEX features a compact vertical dual-chamber design, integrating hydraulic and elastomer cylinders. Its one- piece die-cast aluminum brake cylinder, CNC-machined for precision, delivers smooth pedal feel and outstanding durability.

settings.title: 10MPa Hydraulic Sensor
settings.description: The CPP APEX features a custom 10MPa high-precision hydraulic sensor for accurate brake pressure detection, enabling realistic, nuanced control. Its wide pressure range and hydraulic design ensure linear, responsive braking for precise threshold and trail braking.

settings.title: Enclosed Throttle Design
settings.description:
The throttle pedal features an enclosed design, tightly integrating components like the
spring and throttle rod to prevent external debris from entering and to maintain precise
control. Paired with a proven Hall sensor, it ensures accurate throttle response and
enhances the overall driving experience.

settings.title: Race-Ready Materials and Precision Engineering
settings.description: The pedal is constructed from high-grade aluminum alloy, enhanced with T6 heat treatment and precision CNC machining for superior strength and durability. A sandblasted, anodized finish adds a refined touch, delivering both premium feel and lasting performance.

settings.title: Versatile Deployment
settings.description:
Competition-Grade Mounting: 
• Compatible with all major aluminum profile rigs and integrated rigs. 

Ready-to-Use Setup: 
• Includes a wall-mount bracket for floor installation, equipped with non-slip silicone pads.

settings.title: Expandable Clutch Pedal
settings.description: The CPP APEX comes standard with a two-pedal setup and supports seamless upgrading with an optional clutch pedal to match your driving style.
